title: Xi'an — 3-day itinerary + food hit-list
html:
TL;DR

Pre-trip planning note for xi an, drafted Nov 7 2024 from somewhere in the china chapter (likely shanghai). A 3-day itinerary with separate sub-lists for sights, food, and night life. Same template Yahir used for chengdu in 2024 09 25 things to do in chengdu.

Itinerary

Day 1 — terracotta warriors, huaqing palace, muslim quarter xian + Great Mosque
Day 2 — shaanxi museum (free, arrive early), Big Wild Goose Pagoda, ancient city wall
Day 3 — Yongxing Fang food street, beer

Food hit-list

  • rou jia mo — the "Chinese hamburger"
  • biangbiang noodles — wide hand-pulled belt-noodles
  • yang rou paomo — flatbread crumbled into mutton soup

Night

  • Defu Alley
  • Jiefang Road area
  • Xi'an Brewery

Why it matters in the graph

  • Second instance of Yahir's chengdu-style trip-planning template — there's a repeatable form here (sights / food / night, broken out by day) worth naming.
  • Adds the Shaanxi cuisine pole to a graph that previously only had sichuan food for Chinese regional eating.
  • Sits chronologically between the 2024 10 22 valeria visit and 2024 11 28 leading thoughts about 6 month adventure notes — Yahir is squeezing in major sights as the china chapter visibly winds down.

Open questions

  • Did he actually get all three day-plans done, or was this aspirational like parts of the Chengdu plan?
  • Solo trip or with someone? No companion mentioned.

Wikilinks
